name: kaola-workflow-gitlab
description: GitLab edition of Kaola-Workflow for Codex, using GitLab issues, merge requests, glab, and repo-backed workflow artifacts.

interface.longDescription: Kaola-Workflow GitLab for Codex exposes repo-backed skills and Codex-native agent profiles for project initialization, workflow routing, research, ideation, planning, TDD execution, review, documentation docking, and finalization against GitLab issues and merge requests.
defaultPrompt: Use Kaola-Workflow GitLab for Codex in this repo.
Resume the current Kaola-Workflow GitLab project.
Run workflow-init for Kaola-Workflow GitLab for Codex.
